description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that caches pip files in .cache/pip and defines multiple test jobs for different operating system images. Add a freebsd_release job (tag: freebsd) that runs .ci/freebsd_jail_start.sh, customizes PACKAGE_MANAGERS, installs packages with pkg, runs .ci/freebsd_deps_wrapper.sh, then executes `$PYTHON -m pytest --cov-fail-under=100` and `codecov`. Add an opensuse job (image: opensuse/leap or tumbleweed) that removes non‑OSS repos, adjusts PACKAGE_MANAGERS, installs packages via zypper, sources the common deps script, and runs the same pytest and codecov commands. Add check_code (image: python:3.6) that installs the project and coala‑bears then runs `coala-ci`; add moban (image: python:3.6) that installs moban, clones moban repositories, runs `moban` and `git diff --exit-code`. Add test:arch (image: greyltc/archlinux-aur) that updates pacman, installs ARCH_OTHER_DEPS and PACKAGE_MANAGERS, builds php‑pear, runs the shared pytest script; add Fedora 25 and 28 jobs (images: fedora:25, fedora:28) that install packages via dnf, set PYTHON, run the shared pytest script; add opensuse leap 15.1, 42.3, and tumbleweed jobs (images: opensuse/leap:15.1, opensuse/leap:42.3, opensuse/tumbleweed) with similar setup and pytest; finally add test:ubuntu_rolling (image: ubuntu:rolling) that installs Julia, Java, other apt packages, runs the shared pytest script. All jobs use the common .common_script which runs `$PYTHON -m pytest --cov-fail-under=100` followed by `codecov`.
